theme.description: Sunwashed Moroccan Palette mixed with Accessible Chat best practices. Warm, inclusive, and culturally grounded. Designed for clarity, emotional warmth, and high accessibility.

spacing_and_layout.strategy: Generous Spacing Philosophy with Dashboard Bento Strategy

surfaces_and_micro_themes.chat_container: Solid Background (#FFFFFF) with a 1px border (#E5E1D8) and soft ambient shadow (shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(44,46,51,0.05)]).
surfaces_and_micro_themes.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70, border-b border-white/40.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.input_area: Neumorphism base but crisp: flat background matching parent, 1px subtle border, sharp focus ring on active.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons lift slightly (-translate-y-0.5) and shadow increases. Background darkens slightly. ALWAYS explicitly set text color on hover.
motion_and_interactions.focus_states: High contrast ring: focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#2A9D8F] focus:outline-none.
motion_and_interactions.chat_stream: Use aria-live='polite' and aria-atomic='false'. Animate new messages sliding up (framer-motion).
motion_and_interactions.recording_pulse: When video/audio is recording, the #E76F51 button should have a continuous gentle pulsing animation (scale 1.05 and opacity 0.8 to 1).

components.name: chat_bubble_user
components.classes: bg-[#264653] text-white rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm py-3 px-5 max-w-[85%] self-end shadow-sm

components.name: chat_bubble_ai
components.classes: bg-[#F0EDE5] text-[#2C2E33] rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm py-3 px-5 max-w-[85%] self-start shadow-sm

components.name: sign_language_record_button
components.classes: bg-[#E76F51] text-white rounded-full p-4 shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-[#E76F51]

components.name: language_selector
components.classes: Shadcn Select or DropdownMenu customized, displaying current language. Focus on Darija and Tamazight.

accessibility.aria_live_regions: Apply aria-live='polite' to the chat response container.
accessibility.keyboard_navigation: Logical Tab Order: Input -> Mic Button -> Camera Button -> Send Button. Enter submits, Shift+Enter new line. Escape closes modals.
accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets 4.5:1 ratio. User bubble white on #264653 is > 7:1. AI bubble #2C2E33 on #F0EDE5 is > 7:1.
accessibility.focus_trapping: Trap focus inside the webcam recording modal while open.

icons_strategy.usage: Use simple, recognizable icons. Camera for sign language, Mic for audio, Send for text. Icons should be 20px (w-5 h-5).

images.description: Minimal Moroccan architecture to be used at very low opacity (10%) or as a subtle sidebar/welcome visual to root the app in its cultural context.

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute. Convention: kebab-case, role-based. Example: data-testid='sign-language-record-button'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Set up the Vite React project and FastAPI backend as specified in the problem statement.
Configure Tailwind with the specified colors and fonts (EB Garamond for headings, Figtree for body).
Install framer-motion for smooth chat bubble appearances and recording button pulse effects.
Implement the Chat Interface using a generous spacing layout (Sidebar for history/language if needed, Main for chat).

Implement the sign-language recording feature using the MediaRecorder API, previewing the webcam in a rounded container before sending. Ensure the POST endpoint /api/process-sign-language handles the .webm upload securely.
Ensure the Moroccan Darija and Tamazight language options are prominently featured.
Ensure all accessibility features (ARIA tags, focus management, semantic HTML) are strictly implemented for the deaf/mute target audience.
Use data-testid on every button, input, and chat bubble for testing.
